---
title: "MLSys Playground"
subtitle: "Four small games. Each one is a real ML systems concept made playable."
description: "Browser mini-games that turn ML systems concepts — pruning, the roofline model, GPU memory, mixed-precision quantization — into 30-second arcade loops."
page-layout: article
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/games/common.css">
---

Four little games. Each one takes about a minute to play and quietly teaches one thing about how ML systems actually work. They share a palette and a vibe with the [ML Systems textbook](/) so they feel like part of the same world.

::: {.mlsp-game-cards}

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Pulse Prune
[Shrink a network without breaking it.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

A neural network on a canvas. You've got 45 seconds to remove most of the weights without crashing accuracy. The faint ones are safe; the bright ones are doing real work.

[▶ Play Pulse Prune](/games/prune.html){.mlsp-card-cta}
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Roofline Runner
[Catch the work your GPU can actually finish.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

Move a crosshair to catch falling kernels — only the ones beneath the performance ceiling. Catch one above and you're claiming throughput no hardware can deliver. 30-second rounds, three lives.

[▶ Play Roofline Runner](/games/roofline.html){.mlsp-card-cta}
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### OOM
[Pack training memory before it overflows.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

Activations, gradients, optimizer state, KV cache. Each falls into your GPU's memory at a different rate. Gradients clear when the optimizer steps; activations clear during backward. Survive the run.

[▶ Play OOM](/games/oom.html){.mlsp-card-cta}
:::

::: {.mlsp-game-card}
### Quantization Cliff
[Compress a model before the cliff drops.]{.mlsp-card-tagline}

Six layers. Four precisions. Three deploys to find an allocation that fits the bit budget without losing too much accuracy. First and last layers are the most fragile — but you have to discover that.

[▶ Play Quantization Cliff](/games/quantization.html){.mlsp-card-cta}
:::

:::

---

*MLSys Playground is part of [mlsysbook.ai](/). The games share design vocabulary with the textbook — compute blue, data green, error red, MIT accent — so a figure in the book and a game in your browser feel like the same world.*
